_comment: Mutation testing config. Manual-trigger only (workflow_dispatch). See .github/workflows/mutation.yml for the rationale: bun's test runner has no programmatic API (oven-sh/bun#26191), so stryker-js falls back to spawning the full CLI per mutant — too slow for every push. Scope: 30 pure-function modules under src/lib/, each backed by a dedicated test file. auto-blend-presets.ts is intentionally NOT in scope — it's an orchestrator that fans into store signals (GM_*-backed gm-signal), which doesn't survive stryker's per-mutant CLI spawn without leaking mocks across files (see CLAUDE.md note on mock.module leakage).

commandRunner.command: bun test --isolate tests/wbi-pure.test.ts tests/wbi-diagnostics.test.ts tests/wbi-sentinel.test.ts tests/wbi-xhr-hijack.test.ts tests/auto-blend.test.ts tests/fetch-cache.test.ts tests/user-blacklist-parsers.test.ts tests/remote-keywords-sanitize.test.ts tests/custom-chat-css-sanitize.test.ts tests/moderation.test.ts tests/loop-jitter.test.ts tests/meme-room-filter.test.ts tests/recent-danmaku-key.test.ts tests/live-ws-helpers-extras.test.ts tests/fetch-hijack-helpers.test.ts tests/danmaku-direct-helpers.test.ts tests/custom-chat-render.test.ts tests/api-concurrency.test.ts tests/version-update.test.ts tests/custom-chat-pricing.test.ts tests/cn.test.ts tests/auto-blend-blacklist.test.ts tests/platform.test.ts tests/platform-warn.test.ts tests/emote-picker-position.test.ts tests/clipboard.test.ts tests/sbhzm-freshness-probe.test.ts tests/utils-pure.test.ts tests/utils-extract-room.test.ts tests/meme-sources.test.ts tests/laplace-client.test.ts tests/shadow-suggestion.test.ts tests/md5.test.ts tests/meme-content-key.test.ts tests/auto-blend-status.test.ts tests/auto-blend-preset.test.ts
